text:
久しぶりの森林エリア！
なんだかワクワクするなあ！

しかもあなたと一緒となると
余計にワクワクするよ。

早くもＳランククリアが
楽しみになってきたね。
さ、行こう！

This is pretty exciting! When was the last time
I was even out here?

Now look at me though, out here shoulder to
shoulder with someone like you.
I can hardly wait to get that S Rank. C'mon!

Oh right, you're supposed to take the lead.
After you, then!
